scripts.// Note: All commands load env from .env.local at the repo root via dotenv-cli — Next.js uses the same file.
scripts.migrate: pnpm exec dotenv -e ../../.env.local -- prisma migrate dev
scripts.migrate:deploy: pnpm exec dotenv -e ../../.env.local -- prisma migrate deploy
scripts.migrate:status: pnpm exec dotenv -e ../../.env.local -- prisma migrate status
